problem id: 2e5e7fe7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(2)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  01111000 -> 11111110
  00011010 -> 10111110
  01011011 -> 00010110
  10010011 -> 00101101
  11100000 -> 11111011
  01111110 -> 00111111
  10111001 -> 01101110
  10111011 -> 00101110

query: 10110001
predicted answer: 01101101
